traits.name: Pioneer
traits.description: You are the first to discover and chart a new skill in the ATLAS.

traits.name: Innovator
traits.description: A skill you pioneered has become popular, with over 1000 total XP logged by the community.

traits.name: Specialist
traits.description: You have achieved a high level of mastery (500+ stat points) in a single skill category.

traits.name: Jack of All Trades
traits.description: You have maintained a balanced profile, with all stats above 150 and within 50 points of each other.

traits.name: Vindicator
traits.description: You have proven your sharp judgment by verifying over 50 community submissions.

traits.name: Soul-Sworn
traits.description: Your Fireteam has maintained a Soul Link streak for 7 consecutive days.

traits.name: State Best
traits.description: Your state was the top performer in a recent Faction Challenge.

traits.name: Night Owl
traits.description: Frequently active between 10 PM and 6 AM.

traits.name: Early Bird
traits.description: Frequently active between 5 AM and 9 AM.

traits.name: Focused
traits.description: Logs activities in the same skill category multiple times in a row.

traits.name: Polymath
traits.description: Frequently switches between different skill categories.

traits.name: Streaker
traits.description: Maintains a personal Momentum Flame for over 14 days.

traits.name: Socialite
traits.description: Logs a high number of social activities.

traits.name: Hermit
traits.description: Logs a high number of solo activities (Mental, Creative).

traits.name: Mentor
traits.description: The skills you've pioneered have been unlocked by other users.
